bead.title: Document bd/doltdb fallback wiring for bead backend
bead.description: Single-artifact documentation under docs/ that explains how to wire bd (with its doltdb backend) as the bead backend if axon adoption stalls. Cover: required interface adapter, JSONL interchange (already supported via ddx bead import/export), claim/lock translation, and tradeoffs (external dependency on bd codebase, git-for-data semantics). This is the documented fallback path; no code required.
bead.acceptance: 1. Single doc under docs/ describing bd-as-bead-backend wiring. 2. Covers interface adapter, JSONL interchange, claim/lock translation, tradeoffs. 3. Cross-references the axon TD for comparison.
